title: SDK Test Harness Signals
description: Per-SDK signals derived from the sdk-test-harness repo and each SDK's testharness-suppressions files.

commit.description: git rev-parse HEAD of the sdk-test-harness repo at generation time.

value.description: Capability string value reported by SDK test services, e.g. 'evaluation-hooks'.

doc.description: Doc comment from the Go source, if any.

test_groups.description: Top-level test groups registered in sdktests/testsuite_entry_point.go, keyed by SDK kind.

func.description: Go function or expression passed to t.Run().

participates.description: True if any contract-tests directory or testharness-suppressions file was found in the SDK repo.

repo.description: GitHub repo (org/name) for this SDK, copied from products/repos.json.

repo_commit.description: git rev-parse HEAD of the SDK repo at generation time, or null if the repo is missing locally.

current_ref.description: Branch or tag name the local checkout is on, if not the default branch.

suppressions_files.description: Discovered testharness-suppressions*.txt files, paths relative to the SDK repo root.

variant.description: Variant suffix parsed from filename (e.g. 'fdv2'), or null for the canonical file.

lines.description: Suppression entries, with comments and blank lines stripped.

comments.description: Inline '#' comments preserved with their surrounding context.

applies_to.description: Suppression entries that immediately follow this comment block.

suppressions_by_top_group.description: Count of suppression entries bucketed by top-level test group (first slash-segment of the test path).
